subcodes.first_line: O thou who drinkest the choice wine of My utterance! Hearken unto My call, for it draweth thee unto the horizon whence hath shone forth the Daystar of God's loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الشارب رحیق بیانی اسمع ندائی انه یجذبک الی افق اشرق منه نیر عنایة الله
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for nearness to God, @Greatest Name, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
